title: Spinothalamic Tract
body_html:
The spinothalamic tract (AKA anterolateral tract )transmits sensation from the skin to the thalamus. It consists of two pathways: anterior and lateral. The anterior spinothalamic tract transmits information about crude touch sensation. The lateral spinothalamic tract transmits pain and temperature sensation

The image below shows the various tracts of the spinal cord. The spinothalamic tracts can be seen labelled at the bottom right of the diagram

Image sourced from Wikipedia
